title: Longest Subsequence Repeated k Times
titleCn: 重复 K 次的最长子序列

testcases.input: s = "letsleetcode", k = 2 Output: "let" Explanation: There are two longest subsequences repeated 2 times: "let" and "ete". "let" is the lexicographically largest one.
testcases.expectedOutput: "let" Explanation: There are two longest subsequences repeated 2 times: "let" and "ete". "let" is the lexicographically largest one.

testcases.input: s = "bb", k = 2 Output: "b" Explanation: The longest subsequence repeated 2 times is "b".
testcases.expectedOutput: "b" Explanation: The longest subsequence repeated 2 times is "b".

testcases.input: s = "ab", k = 2 Output: "" Explanation: There is no subsequence repeated 2 times. Empty string is returned.
testcases.expectedOutput: "" Explanation: There is no subsequence repeated 2 times. Empty string is returned.
